physics.js:1  GET https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5.collide2d@1.0.0/+esm net::ERR_ABORTED 404 (Not Found)
analysis:
- Issue identified: The game attempts to import `p5.collide2d` from a CDN URL that is returning a 404 error (`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5.collide2d@1.0.0/+esm`). This breaks the physics module which relies on `collideCircleCircle` and `collideLineCircle`.
- Files affected: `physics.js`
- Changes needed: Remove the failing external import in `physics.js` and implement the necessary collision detection functions (`collideCircleCircle` and `collideLineCircle`) directly within the file. This removes the dependency and fixes the crash while preserving the physics logic.
